title: Revamped Fixed and Mixed
description: Basically, just the Fixed and Mixed Modpack but Not So Controversial...?
body:
_WARNING! It requires fabric loader 0.16+_





![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732c708d519fdfeeccc258c4241886b1dd62faa7.png)




**Welcome to the Fixed and Mixed Modpack!**

This modpack aim to **fix** and **revamp** _(and add)_ all the features of Minecraft, but still maintaining the _vanilla-like!_

![Yoooo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22abfbfcdae92dd3c7d870ec41c77f4308dddaf9.png)



For example, the combat system is revamped to be like the 1.16 experimental snapshots!

Or, welp, Java and Bedrock are now equal! Or... there's the old fog... which brings the old atmosphere...

Speaking of atmosphere, you can play the older models of the world! (like Beta 1.7.3, or Indev...)

Aaaaand, you can toggle the "Nostalgia Features" with the NostalgicTweaks mod!

Also, there are more mobs, more biomes, more items!

Yoooo that's the Copper Golem!

![Copper Golem!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68171825406d47928b558049d613b4c1f46ba735.png)

Basically:

- Combat System revamped to be similiar to the 1.16 experimental snapshots (the one who was discontinued, which is basically CTS 8c)

- You can bring back the old nostalgia feelings!

- You can play the older models of the old Minecraft

- You can play with a controller (or even a mobile touchscreen)

- Music never ends

- Old legacy console sounds :') (you can activate it in the Controlify config)

- Vertical slabs! Yeah, they exist now :)



![Nostalgic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a347b08e5fa7c6bd5f26ccb76a2a03c24350d2.png)


- Java and Bedrock are now equal with almost no differences

- The wild update got more wilder

- Fireflies :D

- Birch Forests are updated!

- The Warden is now more OP

- Cooler animations

- Mob variations

- Faster Minecarts (actually, it completely revamps all the minecart engine)

- Rejected mobs are now added! (welp, not all of them, but most of them)


- Optimization for potato PCs (kinda)

- More dungeons!

- More villages!

- More music discs!

- And many more things...

Also, it's **almost** entirely configurable!

Credits to all the modders and resource pack-ers!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
_It's the almost the same modpack that I made long time ago, but slightly... better?
For more informations, go watch Fixed and Mixed and The Not-so-controversial Modpack.
You'll get the point._
